summary: Iteration 150 - Backend hardening fixes for webhooks dedup, quotes debug log removal, and contracts /agree response ordering. All 3 tasks verified via code inspection and functional testing.

code_verification.P2002_matches: PASS - 3 matches: line 31 (comment), line 39 (Stripe handler), line 98 (Paystack handler)
code_verification.create_first_ordering: PASS - processedWebhookEvent.create at lines 35 and 94, BEFORE handleWebhookEvent (line 49) and checkAndUpdatePaystackPayment (line 105)
code_verification.no_manual_processedAt: PASS - create calls use @default(now()) from schema, no manual processedAt field

T1_webhooks_atomic_dedup.stripe_dedup_flow: VERIFIED - lines 29-49: extract eventId → try create with {stripeEventId: eventId} → on P2002 respond {received: true, duplicate: true} and return → else call paymentService.handleWebhookEvent
T1_webhooks_atomic_dedup.paystack_dedup_flow: VERIFIED - lines 90-105: compute dedupKey = `paystack_${reference}` → try create → on P2002 log 'Duplicate event' and return → else call checkAndUpdatePaystackPayment. Initial res.json({received:true}) at line 82 still present (correct Paystack behavior)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 150 backend hardening verified. T1: webhooks.ts uses atomic create-first dedup with P2002 catch for both Stripe and Paystack handlers. T2: quotes.ts debug logs removed, sendQuoteAcceptedNotification intact with new !notifSent warn. T3: contracts.ts /agree responds immediately after DB update, all 6 side effects run in setImmediate. Quote SAMPLE-MO2VCJ41 is now ACCEPTED. Contract cmocpl3f40001cg1h0mjc7v2l is now AGREED with 4 auto-generated milestones.
